custom_filename.mechanism: not observed — filename is fixed as SKILL.md

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (required); documents what the skill does and when Gemini should use it — drives auto-invocation decisions

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required); value should match the skill's directory name

providerExtensions.name: Supporting file directories
providerExtensions.summary: Optional scripts/, references/, and assets/ subdirectories alongside SKILL.md for organizing executable scripts, static docs, and templates.

providerExtensions.name: Built-in skill-creator skill
providerExtensions.summary: Bundled skill that scaffolds new skill directories with SKILL.md and standard subdirectories from a natural language prompt.

providerExtensions.name: skills.enabled and skills.disabled settings
providerExtensions.summary: settings.json skills object supports an enabled boolean (default: true) to toggle the entire skill system, and a disabled string array to suppress individual skills by name without removing them.

providerExtensions.name: .agents/skills/ directory alias
providerExtensions.summary: .agents/skills/ is accepted as an alias for .gemini/skills/ (and ~/.agents/skills/ for ~/.gemini/skills/), providing compatibility with other agent tools following the Agent Skills standard.

providerExtensions.name: gemini skills CLI subcommands
providerExtensions.summary: gemini skills install <url> installs a skill from a Git repository; gemini skills link . symlinks a local skill directory into the user skills path for iterative development; node scripts/package_skill.cjs packages a skill as a .skill zip file.
